title: hernandia obovata
intro: Hernandia obovata, also known as the water calcifuge or false water caltrop, is a plant species that belongs to the family Hernandiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Hernandia obovata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in herbal remedies, or as a component in traditional tonics and teas to promote overall health and well-being.
